This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Planners Network records
Planners Network (Association)
4054
3 cubic feet. 3 cubic feet.
1975-2009. Printed Materials, Publications, Reports, Research Materials Records of the organization and its various conferences, brochures and newsletters, from 1975 onward. Collection material in English 2070620
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Pierre Clavel
Date completed:
December 15, 2007
EAD encoding:
Evan Fay Earle, April 2009
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records of the organization and its various conferences, brochures and newsletters, from 1975 onward.
NOTES
Forms part of Progressive Cities and Neighborhood Planning Collections.
Cite As:
Planners Network records, #4054. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
City planning -- Periodicals. City planning -- Societies, etc.
